programme.title: 锦衣卫
programme.desc: 明朝时，英宗昏庸无能，大权落入刘永饰的宦官之手，他利用锦衣卫诛杀异己；然梁家仁饰的锦衣卫统领却义释忠良。其父在宦官胁迫下被迫追杀亲子...

programme.title: Raw Passions
programme.desc: Mrs Lin's husband and his friend both have affairs with a belly dancer Sasa, and are both blackmailed by her. Sasa is stabbed one day and her brother shows up asking for money. A mysterious man also claims he can offer evidence for cash to help Lin's husband. Lin has to unveil the deceit, double-crosses and blackmailing before she is in danger too!

programme.title: 裸血
programme.desc: 凌波的丈夫高远及其友王侠，均与肚皮舞女郎孟莉有染，孟藉此勒索二人；后孟被杀，高成嫌疑犯，另孟之兄翟诺，亦向高勒索；而凌在家，也接见了谷峰，他声言有为高洗罪的证据，但要索钱；王妻李香君借贷给凌... 究竟谁是杀孟真凶？

programme.title: Sweet And Wild
programme.desc: Fang is a spunky young village girl who is not afraid to fight back against hooligans. She gets into trouble with the biggest hoodlum Tong when she foils his plans with a maid, causing Tong to plot a revenge. Luckily a man whom she is attracted to, Hai, comes in time to her rescue. Can they fight back?

programme.title: 野姑娘
programme.desc: 金小芳是一位活泼且无畏的乡村少女，面对恶霸从不退缩，总是勇敢反抗。当她揭露了唐家大少爷的阴谋后，立刻引来他的狠毒报复。幸好，她心仪的男子大海及时挺身而出相救。两人能否携手对抗险恶命运，改写结局？

programme.title: The King Boxer
programme.desc: This tale of a honorable fighter's retraining in the "Iron Palm" style, that became the first international martial arts movie hit and made a continent-spanning star of Lo Lieh.

programme.title: 天下第一拳
programme.desc: 故事描述，顾文宗饰的老拳师突遭百武馆馆徒袭击，幸汪萍饰的女儿及罗烈饰的弟子救驾；顾自知年迈力衰，不足为罗师，亦恐邪派夺全国锦标，遂面谕罗改投尚武馆习艺，以夺魁为期许。罗途遇王金凤饰的卖唱女遭调戏，王获救后欲以身相许，罗心中有汪遂拒王；后罗屡遭百武馆徒滋扰，更为外援日本浪人所伤...

programme.title: The Delinquent
programme.desc: This is a coming-of-age tale depicting the lower class Hong Kong troubled youths in the 1960s and the societal issues that they face. Wang Chung is a hotheaded and rebellious teen who is tempted by the dark side, and have to unfortunately pay a huge price for it.

programme.title: 愤怒青年
programme.desc: 沈昌生性沉郁，与父亲缺乏沟通，被人利用，误入歧途。昌逃不过暴力的魔爪和色情的引诱，竟然出卖父亲，让父亲惨死。昌悲悔交加，独闯飞仔巢，逐一将之击毙，自已也进入疯狂状态。

programme.title: Ambush
programme.desc: Constable Wen Chao Fan and his father are framed for a jewel robbery they did not commit. On the run from the law and becoming a wanted fugitive, Wen must recover the jewels in order to clear his family name, but unfortunately he is not the only one seeking the stolen jewels...

programme.title: 埋伏
programme.desc: 捕快万超凡与父亲遭人诬陷，背负抢劫珠宝的罪名，沦为逃亡的通缉犯。身陷绝境，万超凡誓要寻回失落的珠宝，洗脱万家的冤屈。然而，他并非唯一寻宝之人......

programme.title: King Drummer
programme.desc: A young musician Chi Chiang is hired by the manager of a popular band when the group's drummer/leader Charlie, quits to join a rival group. The new drummer becomes an immediate hit, causing Charlie to be very jealous. Furthermore, the young drummer's mother is dead set against him having a music career.

programme.title: 青春鼓王
programme.desc: 船员孙志强巧合成为「火花大乐队」的鼓手，他因急于成名，答应帮助音乐杂志出版人李源明接近乐队经理黄丽真，以换取源明的力捧。终于，志强得偿所愿，一炮而红，源明却逼他实践诺言，与丽真断绝来往。志强受到极大打击，唯有忍痛离开乐队与丽真...

programme.title: Clan Feuds
programme.desc: Tie Zhong Tang, the adopted son of the Great Banner Sect leader, is hunted by the sect's rival for the secret to its hidden treasure. To uncover the truth, he journeys to an island seeking the "Empress of the Day", only to find her dead. There, he unexpectedly meets the sect's founder, the "Emperor of the Night", who reveals that he is Tie's biological father.

programme.title: 大旗英雄传
programme.desc: 铁中棠乃大旗门掌门云翼之义子，因门派宝藏之秘密而遭宿敌司徒笑追杀。为解开身世与宝藏之谜，他远赴长春岛寻访「日后」，却发现她早已离世。岂料在岛上意外遇见大旗门真正的创派掌门「夜帝」，而夜帝亦亲口揭露，自己正是铁中棠的生父。

programme.title: Return of the Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: This sequel makes for more bittersweet laughs and heart-wrenching misfortune, as Ah Niu gets out of the jail to find his true love becoming the wife of an abusive husband, and his uncle further exploits his naive nature.

programme.title: 阿牛出狱记
programme.desc: 续集中阿牛不幸的遭遇更令人心痛，当中不少更是笑中有泪的经历。阿牛出狱后，再遇爱人阿花，可惜她已嫁为人妻；另一方面，戆直的阿牛仍不断被狡猾的周大叔欺骗...

programme.title: Four Riders
programme.desc: Four martial arts experts live in Seoul after the Korean War in the 1950s. One of them inexplicably crosses path with a drug trafficking syndicate, and his three friends have no choice but to fight a brutal battle on his side...

programme.title: 四骑士
programme.desc: 韩战结束之后的汉城，出现了近代四骑士。他们包括拳术教官金义、搏击教练冯侠、爆破专家高英寒及枪械专家李维诗。四人于兵燹之中幸存，不约而同以寻欢作乐作为生活方式。以霍克、雷泰、银花为首的贩毒组织，欲收买退役美国军曹偷运毒品回国，军曹最后不欲冒险，被霍克手下爪牙杀死。冯侠被嫁祸成杀人嫌疑犯，金义、高英寒、李维诗为救朋友，同心协力与罪恶组织展开多场生死搏斗...

programme.title: A Maid From Heaven
programme.desc: The seventh daughter of the Jade Emperor is banished from heaven to live a mortal life as she is very mischievous. She falls in love with a young village lad Yong, who sold himself to work for the rich so as to bury his father. The goddess sisters help Yong to pay his debt so the lovebirds can be together. Is this going to end happily-ever-after?

programme.title: A Maid From Heaven
programme.desc: The seventh daughter of the Jade Emperor is banished from heaven to live a mortal life as she is very mischievous. She falls in love with a young village lad Yong, who sold himself to work for the rich so as to bury his father. The goddess sisters help Yong to pay his debt so the lovebirds can be together. Is this going to end happily-ever-after?

programme.title: 七仙女
programme.desc: 故事描述少年董永卖身传员外家，为奴以埋父骨；其孝心感动了七仙女，便幻成村姑，在六位仙姐下凡暗助下，为董缩减偿还工作日，回复自由后，二人回董故家，但愉快的凡间生活能持续多久呢？

programme.title: 七仙女
programme.desc: 故事描述少年董永卖身传员外家，为奴以埋父骨；其孝心感动了七仙女，便幻成村姑，在六位仙姐下凡暗助下，为董缩减偿还工作日，回复自由后，二人回董故家，但愉快的凡间生活能持续多久呢？

programme.title: The Magic Blade
programme.desc: The movie depicts Fu Hong Xue fighting against the formidable conspirator Master Yu and seeing through his deception. The brilliantly choreographed fights, glorious settings, superb cinematography and strong casts define this movie as a highpoint in Wu Xia cinema.

programme.title: 天涯明月刀
programme.desc: 电影讲述傅红雪为了应付势力庞大的阴谋家公子羽，除了力敌对方的爪牙，亦要智破对方的诡计。凭藉出色的武打设计、华丽的布景、唯美的拍摄技巧及强劲的演员阵容，《天涯明月刀》在武侠电影的历史上创下高锋。

programme.title: River of Tears
programme.desc: Retired singer Fang lives happily with her husband and son. Tragedy happens when a man from her past returns to haunt her. In an ensuing struggle to free her from his clutches, her husband dies in a car accident. Blamed by her father-in-law for her husband's death, Fang gets chased out of the house and goes back to singing to make a living...

programme.title: 相思河畔
programme.desc: 富商之子冯琪伟恋上歌女方碧玉，碧玉身世凄凉，常受流氓头子林老二及李老三压榨勒索，幸得琪伟相助并娶之为妻。婚后二人育一子，惜李老三再度敲诈，最终琪伟为爱妻讨回公道而与李老三同归于尽...

programme.title: The Fantastic Magic Baby
programme.desc: The story is about the legendary Monkey King (Liu Chung-chun) teams up with Goddess of Mercy (Chao Li-chuan) and the Dragon Girl (Lung Nu) to battle the child god Hung Hai-erh (Ting Hua-chung),son of the Ox Demon (Hung Hai-erh) to rescue Tang Tseng, the Holy Pilgrim (Teng Chio-jen).

programme.title: 红孩儿
programme.desc: 牛魔王与铁扇公主夫妇为吃唐僧肉，命儿子红孩儿对付孙悟空师徒。红孩儿凭"三昧真火"屡挫悟空，后幸得观音命龙女协助悟空救回唐僧等人，更将红孩儿点化，收其为观音身边的善才童子。此片弘扬回头是岸的大道理，发人深省。

programme.title: Forever And Ever
programme.desc: Ivy Ling Po plays a young scholar who is manipulated into marrying a nobleman's reluctant daughter. After marrying, he soon discovers the reason for her hesitation. She is stricken with a contagious disease. But, with the power of true love, their romance prevails.

programme.title: 金石情
programme.desc: 刘贞莲不幸身患麻疯，其父刘员外招赘穷书生李孝文为婿，意图卖疯传毒。贞莲将真相和盘托出，孝文感于贞莲真情，决意回乡禀明母亲，迎接贞莲返家。孝文走后，贞莲万念俱灰，竟狂饮毒酒，以图自尽...

programme.title: Return Of The Dead
programme.desc: A long-awaited horror sequel after Enchanted Shadow, this is about three asylum inmates telling their stories. In story one, a husband and wife discover they should be careful what they wish for. A naked female ghost seeks revenge from her watery grave in story two, and a dead prostitute returns as a ghost in the last tale.

programme.title: 销魂玉
programme.desc: 王致和无意得到通灵玩意，许下三个愿望，虽然愿望灵验之极，结果落得家散人亡；风尘女孟薇被情人林坤全害死，变成水鬼复仇；艳丽女子萧云玉香消玉殒后，仍不断在人间走动，盗坟贼欲挖开萧云玉坟墓盗取陪葬珠宝，终被萧云玉追杀致死...

programme.title: To Kill a Jaguar
programme.desc: Set in 1920s Shanghai, a village girl journeys to the big city in search of her father and meets her childhood friend Jaguar, who works for the mob boss Kam. In a world controlled by the mobs, it is a test of survival for all as Jaguar allies himself with ace gunman Ko Tang, to take over Kam's empire.

programme.title: 绝不低头
programme.desc: 少女波波为寻父和找寻未婚夫罗烈，遇上童时玩伴黑豹，黑豹是城中势力最大金二爷的助手。波波在黑豹照料下，逐渐忘记罗烈而爱上黑豹，黑豹自幼就喜欢波波，但是处处输给罗烈，心狠手辣的他，逼婚不成，便在波波面前折磨金二爷，原来金二爷竟是波波的父亲赵大爷，后来罗烈出狱...

programme.title: The Brave Archer 2
programme.desc: Knowing Guo Jing has won Huang Rong's hand in marriage using the kung fu learned from Jiu Yin manual, Ouyang Feng captures Huang and agrees to release her only if Guo can dictate the content of the manual. Will Guo give in to the threat?

programme.title: 射雕英雄传续集
programme.desc: 欧阳锋得悉郭靖以九阴真经的功夫于选婿比武中获胜，并娶得黄蓉为妻，于是把黄蓉挟走，要胁郭靖要默写九阴真经才会释放黄蓉。最终郭靖会否为救出黄蓉而就范？

programme.title: The Land of Many Perfumes
programme.desc: Monk Tang San Zang, Monkey, Pigsy and Sha Wu Jing find themselves in Womanland, where women only give birth to baby girls and do so by drinking the magical spring water.

programme.title: 女儿国
programme.desc: 本片讲述唐僧、孙悟空、猪八戒及沙和尚一行四人往西天取经，行至西梁女儿国，国内全是女人，而传宗接代生儿育女全靠「招胎泉」，饮过这泉水便可成孕，但也只能生女。

programme.title: Heroes Two
programme.desc: Shaolin disciple Hong escapes from the burning temple after it is attacked by the Qing army and is badly wounded. He is handed over to the Qing soldiers by Fang as he mistakes Hong for a bandit. When Fang realizes his mistakes, he tries all ways to help Hong escape so that they can team up to fight the Qing army together.

programme.title: 方世玉与洪熙官
programme.desc: 清兵火烧少林寺，少林弟子洪熙官身受重伤，负伤潜逃。刚巧方世玉经过，误认洪熙官为无恶不作之徒，并将其交付清兵。当方世玉知道自己误捉洪熙官时，千方百计要救出他，好让二人可合力将清兵击退。

programme.title: Lady General Hua Mu-Lan
programme.desc: Mulan disguises herself as a male soldier to replace her aged father in a war against the barbarians. Her courage brings her victory in battles and she was promoted to a general. When Mulan returns home with glory, the chief commander asks her to marry his daughter, forcing Mulan to reveal her true identity.

programme.title: 花木兰
programme.desc: 花木兰因父亲年事已高，毅然女扮男装替父从军，对战匈奴。她英勇善战，屡立奇功，更被擢升为大将军。木兰衣锦还乡，为家族赢得了无上的荣光。元帅欲将女儿许配给她的时候，才得知她是女儿身。

programme.title: The New One-Armed Swordsman
programme.desc: David Chiang plays the all-new one-armed hero - a swordsman who chops off his right arm rather than live with dishonour. When the love of his life is kidnapped and his best friend is murdered by the evil gang, it is time to battle.

programme.title: 新独臂刀
programme.desc: 姜大卫饰演一个宁愿自废右臂退出江湖，也不愿委屈求全的大侠，一直过着隐姓埋名的生活。直到至爱被绑架，好兄弟被杀害，他誓要重出江湖与恶势力一战。

programme.title: The Tiger and the Widow
programme.desc: The Liu Chia-liang trained Hui Ying-hung was considered the top action martial arts female star in the 1980s. It is her martial arts abilities that Michelle Yeoh tries to emulate. In The Tiger and the Widow, Hui Ying-hung is somehow mixed up in a salt smuggling ring that stinks of missing persons and rotten dilemmas.

programme.title: 徐老虎与白寡妇
programme.desc: 本片改编自高阳同名著作，获第18届金马奖最佳服装设计、最佳美术设计两项奖。本片讲述清朝食盐私枭徐老虎与白寡妇因清官李振彪拒不受贿，再加上责令严缉私盐，二人面临缉案危机。为免同僚落网，白独担罪责。徐悉白被处死，一心复仇...

programme.title: King Cat
programme.desc: The son of the imperial teacher is beheaded by Justice Bao for corruption. Infuriated, the teacher hires assassins to kill Bao, who is saved by Zhan Zhao. Meanwhile, a royal treasure is stolen while a murder takes place. Bao is ordered to solve the case in ten days and Zhan quickly sets off to investigate. Will they solve the case in time?

programme.title: 七侠五义
programme.desc: 太师之子在陈州贪赃枉法，私吞皇粮，被包拯当场斩首处死。太师知道后大怒，并令人刺杀包拯，幸得展昭及时阻止，救回他一命。皇上的珍品被偷的同时，宫中又发生谋杀案，于是，皇上限定包拯要在十天内破案。展昭马上出发搜捕凶手。包拯和展昭最后可否如期破案？

programme.title: The Monkey Goes West
programme.desc: Adapted from the classic Chinese novel of the same title, the story follows Monk Tang San Zang's journey to the West in search of the Buddhist Sutra. On the way, he encounters and takes as disciples, Monkey, Pigsy and Sha Wu Jing.

programme.title: 西游记
programme.desc: 本片根据中国经典同名名著改编。故事讲述唐僧赴西天取经，中途在五指山收服马骝精；在高家庄收服猪八戒；在流沙河收服沙悟净的种种情节。。

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling.

programme.title: 记住乡愁
programme.desc: 以弘扬中华优秀传统文化为宗旨，以传统村落为载体，以生活化的故事为依托，以乡愁为情感基础，以优秀的传统文化为核心，展现传统村落的自然环境、人文景观、民风民俗、乡土之物、文化积淀等。

programme.title: Across The Strait (Live)
programme.desc: Across The Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflecting the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and detailing the Chinese Government's policy of "one country, two systems".

programme.title: 海峡两岸
programme.desc: 节目宗旨是"跟踪海峡热点，反映两岸民意"，节目分为两个版块：第一个是"热点扫描"，主要报道当日的近期台湾岛内的热点新闻；第二个是"热点透视"，当日或近期涉台热点深度报道及两岸专家对此事的评论，并对两岸各个层面的交流交往进行跟踪报道。

programme.title: China News (Live)
programme.desc: China News focuses on the latest news and social changes happening in China as well as all over the world.

programme.title: 中国新闻
programme.desc: 《中国新闻》是以海外华人华侨、港澳台同胞、留学生、驻外使领馆及中资机构人员为目标受众的综合性新闻栏目。栏目由国内外要闻、中国内地经济和社会新闻、对国内外重要新闻事件的分析和评论组成。

programme.title: Focus Today (Live)
programme.desc: Focus Today traces current affairs from China and the world.

programme.title: 今日关注
programme.desc: 《今日关注》紧密跟踪国内外重大新闻事件、新闻话题，邀请国内外一流的专家和高级官员，梳理新闻来龙去脉，分析新闻背后的新闻，评论新闻事件的影响和发展趋势。

programme.title: Talk With Lujian (Live)
programme.desc: This programme interviews global influencers, outstanding overseas Chinese representatives, as well as domestic celebrities in various fields.

programme.title: 鲁健访谈
programme.desc: 作为一档30分钟的高端人物访谈栏目，《鲁健访谈》的选题方向为全球影响力人物（包括政治、经济、科技、体育、文化等领域）、海外杰出华人代表、国内各领域知名人士。

programme.title: Network News
programme.desc: Network News is a 30-minute programme focusing on news about China and the world.

programme.title: 新闻联播
programme.desc: 《新闻联播》是中国中央电视台于1978年1月1日创办的综合性新闻节目，是国内外观众群最庞大、影响最广泛的电视新闻栏目。

programme.title: Across The Strait (Live)
programme.desc: Across The Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflecting the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and detailing the Chinese Government's policy of "one country, two systems".

programme.title: 海峡两岸
programme.desc: 节目宗旨是"跟踪海峡热点，反映两岸民意"，节目分为两个版块：第一个是"热点扫描"，主要报道当日的近期台湾岛内的热点新闻；第二个是"热点透视"，当日或近期涉台热点深度报道及两岸专家对此事的评论，并对两岸各个层面的交流交往进行跟踪报道。

programme.title: Feng Yu Song Chun Gui
programme.desc: CCTV brings you broadcasts of finely-produced artistic dramas that closely follow the pulse of the times.

programme.title: 收视指南
programme.desc: 中国中央电视台中文国际频道（CCTV-4）是中央电视台唯一一个面向全球播出的中文频道。《收视指南》栏目专门介绍央视的播出内容。

programme.title: Nostalgia - Pian Duan Zhan Bo
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling.

programme.title: 记住乡愁-片段展播
programme.desc: 以弘扬中华优秀传统文化为宗旨，以传统村落为载体，以生活化的故事为依托，以乡愁为情感基础，以优秀的传统文化为核心，展现传统村落的自然环境、人文景观、民风民俗、乡土之物、文化积淀等。

programme.title: Network News
programme.desc: Network News is a 30-minute programme focusing on news about China and the world.

programme.title: 新闻联播
programme.desc: 《新闻联播》是中国中央电视台于1978年1月1日创办的综合性新闻节目，是国内外观众群最庞大、影响最广泛的电视新闻栏目。

programme.title: Talk With Lujian (Live)
programme.desc: This programme interviews global influencers, outstanding overseas Chinese representatives, as well as domestic celebrities in various fields.

programme.title: 鲁健访谈
programme.desc: 作为一档30分钟的高端人物访谈栏目，《鲁健访谈》的选题方向为全球影响力人物（包括政治、经济、科技、体育、文化等领域）、海外杰出华人代表、国内各领域知名人士。

programme.title: Nostalgia - Pian Duan Zhan Bo
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling.

programme.title: On The Way
programme.desc: This large-scale tourism programme is designed to present the rich tourism resources in China and around the world.

programme.title: 远方的家

programme.title: 收视指南

programme.title: China News (Live)

programme.title: 中国新闻
programme.desc: 《中国新闻》是以海外华人华侨、港澳台同胞、留学生、驻外使领馆及中资机构人员为目标受众的综合性新闻栏目。栏目由国内外要闻、中国内地经济和社会新闻、对国内外重要新闻事件的分析和评论组成。

programme.desc: Focus Today traces current affairs from China and the world.

programme.title: 今日关注
programme.desc: 《今日关注》紧密跟踪国内外重大新闻事件、新闻话题，邀请国内外一流的专家和高级官员，梳理新闻来龙去脉，分析新闻背后的新闻，评论新闻事件的影响和发展趋势。

programme.title: 鲁健访谈

programme.title: Across The Strait (Live)
programme.desc: Across The Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflecting the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and detailing the Chinese Government's policy of "one country, two systems".

programme.title: 海峡两岸
programme.desc: 节目宗旨是"跟踪海峡热点，反映两岸民意"，节目分为两个版块：第一个是"热点扫描"，主要报道当日的近期台湾岛内的热点新闻；第二个是"热点透视"，当日或近期涉台热点深度报道及两岸专家对此事的评论，并对两岸各个层面的交流交往进行跟踪报道。

programme.desc: 以弘扬中华优秀传统文化为宗旨，以传统村落为载体，以生活化的故事为依托，以乡愁为情感基础，以优秀的传统文化为核心，展现传统村落的自然环境、人文景观、民风民俗、乡土之物、文化积淀等。

programme.title: TV Guide
programme.desc: Stay tuned to CCTV-4 as we introduce you to the various content and programming on the channel.

programme.title: 收视指南
programme.desc: 中国中央电视台中文国际频道（CCTV-4）是中央电视台唯一一个面向全球播出的中文频道。《收视指南》栏目专门介绍央视的播出内容。

programme.title: China News (Live)
programme.desc: China News focuses on the latest news and social changes happening in China as well as all over the world.

programme.title: 中国新闻
programme.desc: 《中国新闻》是以海外华人华侨、港澳台同胞、留学生、驻外使领馆及中资机构人员为目标受众的综合性新闻栏目。栏目由国内外要闻、中国内地经济和社会新闻、对国内外重要新闻事件的分析和评论组成。

programme.title: Focus Today (Live)
programme.desc: Focus Today traces current affairs from China and the world.

programme.title: 今日关注
programme.desc: 《今日关注》紧密跟踪国内外重大新闻事件、新闻话题，邀请国内外一流的专家和高级官员，梳理新闻来龙去脉，分析新闻背后的新闻，评论新闻事件的影响和发展趋势。

programme.title: China Showbiz
programme.desc: China Showbiz gathers a wide range of wonderful TV artistic works and directs viewers into a fabulous world of arts through appreciation and review of these works.

programme.title: 中国文艺
programme.desc: 以弘扬中华民族传统文化、播撒五千年古老文明、关注中国与世界重大的文艺活动、用精彩的电视文艺作品为海内外华人观众打开一扇精神视窗为目标。

programme.title: Across The Strait (Live)
programme.desc: Across The Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflecting the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and detailing the Chinese Government's policy of "one country, two systems".

programme.title: 海峡两岸
programme.desc: 节目宗旨是"跟踪海峡热点，反映两岸民意"，节目分为两个版块：第一个是"热点扫描"，主要报道当日的近期台湾岛内的热点新闻；第二个是"热点透视"，当日或近期涉台热点深度报道及两岸专家对此事的评论，并对两岸各个层面的交流交往进行跟踪报道。

programme.title: Asia Today (Live)
programme.desc: CCTV-4 brings you the latest on Asia news, from an Asian perspective.

programme.title: 今日亚洲
programme.desc: 以亚洲人的视角报道亚洲、传达亚洲人的声音、展现亚洲的进步和发展、反映亚洲与世界其他地区的互动。

programme.title: Health China
programme.desc: Stay tuned to CCTV-4 as we introduce you to the various content and programming on the channel.

programme.title: 健康中国
programme.desc: 中国中央电视台中文国际频道（CCTV-4）是中央电视台唯一一个面向全球播出的中文频道。

programme.title: Universal Show
programme.desc: This programme invites outstanding artistes from all over the world - including those in music, dance, acrobatics, magic and other art forms - to perform with China's works of art to create a "cultural integration" platform.

programme.title: 环球综艺秀
programme.desc: 《环球综艺秀》邀请世界各国的优秀艺术家和文艺作品，包含音乐、舞蹈、杂技、魔术、达人创新等各种艺术形式，和中国的优秀艺术作品共同演绎，打造一个"文化共融"平台。

programme.title: China News (Live)
programme.desc: China News focuses on the latest news and social changes happening in China as well as all over the world.

programme.title: 中国新闻
programme.desc: 《中国新闻》是以海外华人华侨、港澳台同胞、留学生、驻外使领馆及中资机构人员为目标受众的综合性新闻栏目。栏目由国内外要闻、中国内地经济和社会新闻、对国内外重要新闻事件的分析和评论组成。

programme.title: China's Public Opinion Field (Live)
programme.desc: This programme brings media professionals, commentators and online opinion leaders into the studio to express views on current issues.

programme.title: 中国舆论场
programme.desc: 《中国舆论场》将通过大数据分析全媒体平台的舆论热点，并通过融媒体模式带动全民参与话题讨论。每期节目将请来相关专家现场进行专业分析、理性解读。

programme.title: Oily Maniac
programme.desc: Famous director Ho Meng-hua, who gave Jackie Chan and Sammo Hung acting breaks in his early kung-fu films, broke new ground with his horror hit Oily Maniac. Based on a true story about a creature that kills people at night and covers them in oil, it stars young actor Danny Lee (aka. Li Hsiu-hsien) as the oily maniac. It was considered so scary that it was censored drastically.

programme.title: 油鬼子
programme.desc: 故事描述沈元（李修贤）亡父与林亚峇（谷峰）为生死之交。沈父临终前，曾在林之背上刺有神秘图案，而此图实是一道有特殊功能的符。后林为保护女儿中月（陈萍）而杀人，被判死刑；林被处死前，着沈把图案描下，以备不时之须。沈按图文指示，化身成威力无穷的油鬼子，帮助过不少人，亦铲除不少坏人，但最终却陷入疯狂状态。

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing tracks, but is subsequently entangled with loan sharks. Li becomes debt-laden while his sons are harassed by debt collectors, when more heart-wrenching events begin to unfold.

programme.title: 爱的世界
programme.desc: 李子良丧妻后，与两个儿子相依为命。妻子的巨额医药费令子良经济十分拮据，受同事教唆往马场孤注一掷，迫得向高利贷借款，从此子良债台高筑，疲于奔命，没有时间与儿子沟通，父子疏离。与此同时高利贷不断登门恐吓，骚扰儿子，最终弄至悲剧发生...

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Mr. Virgin is a romantic comedy about a twenty-nine year-old man Chao Yu-ting (Alfred Chang) who has seemingly been cursed. He becomes paranoid when a Feng Shui expert tells him it will be unlucky for him to marry before the age of thirty... so comical chaos line the days up to his next birthday!

programme.title: 三十处男
programme.desc: 设计师赵宇庭被批算三十岁前结婚，会被妻子克死，赵父遂严禁赵宇庭结交异性。但限期将届，他急不及待觅对象。荔玲与母亲同为死人化妆师，为了交男友改为新娘化妆，此时她认识了赵宇庭...

programme.title: The Bare-footed Kid
programme.desc: A poor, bare-footed young man from the countryside arrives in the city to work with the friend of his dead father. When their dye shop is burnt down by a local strongman, he decides to fight back to protect all of them and save the shop.

programme.title: 赤脚小子
programme.desc: 穷乡青年关丰曜，终日赤着双脚，以背人过河为活。关父临终前，嘱其出城投靠段青云；段骤见故人之子，留下关在布店当小工。关与私塾女教师华小莲交心，却遭莲父白眼；关为求出人头地，竟往投靠土霸喀和布，结果连累莲父与段相继被喀暗算身亡。关得知真相，惜为时已晚，追悔莫及，决与喀拼过死活...

programme.title: Hong Kong Hong Kong
programme.desc: After moving to Hong Kong, illegal immigrant Mang has no choice but to live in cramped quarters with male migrants who abuse her. In order to attain Hong Kong residency and a better life, she agrees to marry a lonely old carpenter. After her marriage, Mang crosses paths again with her ex-lover, and the two develop a passionate affair...

programme.title: 男与女
programme.desc: 偷渡客孟思晨匿居于山边木屋区，沦为众男工具，期间结识非法拳师江远生，并发生雾水情缘。后来思晨下嫁中年木匠贵叔，生活虽安稳，心灵却空虚。意外再遇远生后，难免干柴烈火，未几更有孕...

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: 少年陈真之乱世英雄
programme.desc: 电影讲述清末上海的小人物陈真，在经历苦难及面对无数挑战后，蜕变成长为民族英雄的故事。

programme.title: When Fortune Smiles
programme.desc: A rich man dies, leaving all his fortune to his daughter in his will, but his son and nephew want a piece of the pie. The nephew sends Vincent to steal the will and the son finds Fung, who looks like his sister, to get the will. Vincent plans to marry Fung for the fortune, but as the two fall in love, they decide to unveil the cunning schemes.

programme.title: 无敌幸运星
programme.desc: 富翁死前立下遗嘱，把财富全留给女儿飞飞，逼使其子秋少及侄儿大傻设法分一杯羹。大傻派小混混幸运星往偷遗嘱，欲在遗嘱上做手脚，而秋少亦找来貌似其妹的阿凤假扮飞飞骗取遗嘱。幸运星打算骗"假飞飞"结婚以夺取遗产，不料二人日久生情，最终幸运星在婚礼日揭发二人的诡计。

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Hong Kong action cinema is famous for its real kung fu moves performed by a group called "Kung Fu Stuntmen". This docu-film pays tribute to the generations of kung fu stuntmen, with the crew spending over two years digging archives and interviewing many talents, including the most prominent masters like Jackie Chan, Donnie Yen and Sammo Hung.

programme.title: 龙虎武师
programme.desc: 香港动作电影向来以龙虎武师的真功夫蜚声国际。这部纪录片向过去所有的龙虎武师致敬，并用上超过两年时间梳理了海量的影像资料，更采访了无数动作特技演员分享拍摄时的辛酸事迹，当中包括著名武打巨星成龙、甄子丹及洪金宝。

programme.title: Legend Of The Fist- The Return Of Chen Zhen
programme.desc: In 1920s Shanghai, Chen Zhen goes undercover as a businessman to expose a mob boss's collaboration with the Japanese. While gaining his trust, he must also combat a wave of assassins sent by a brutal Japanese general. Fighting from the shadows in a black mask, he allies with a police captain to protect the city's patriots with his formidable fists.

programme.title: 精武风云 - 陈真
programme.desc: 1920年代的上海，陈真以年轻实业家身份潜伏，欲揭露黑社会头目与日军的勾结。他不仅要取得头目的信任，还需应对日军将领麾下杀手的重重狙杀。为隐匿行迹，他戴起黑色面具，联手警局队长，以威猛铁拳守护这座城市的爱国志士。

programme.title: Mr Vampire II
programme.desc: Grave-robbing archaeologists unearth a family of preserved vampires and plan to sell them on the black market. However, they accidentally break the paper spells that had kept the vampires immobilized during transport. The vampires escape, but a local herbalist Lin is soon on their trail, determined to destroy them.

programme.title: 僵尸家族
programme.desc: 一群盗墓的考古学家意外发现一个保存完好的僵尸家族，计画将他们贩卖至黑市牟利。岂料在运送途中，不慎撕下封印僵尸的纸符，让沉睡的亡灵苏醒逃窜。然而，当地中医师林正英挺身而出，誓要将它们彻底剿灭。

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: 反收数特遣队
programme.desc: 在金融危机期间，绝大多数香港市民陷入债务困境。此时，贵利集团采取无情手段逼迫债务人还款，李探员与其地下部队誓言缉拿这个非法组织的头目。

programme.title: Behind the Yellow Line
programme.desc: A fresh graduate, Paul, strikes up an acquaintance with a pretty young girl, Monica, on the metro. Monica is involved in a love affair with a married man while Paul is also pursued by a rich girl. When Paul vows his true love for Monica, she suggests playing hide-and-seek with him in the metro to decide if they are fated to be together.

programme.title: 缘份
programme.desc: 一个刚毕业的年青人在地铁站内邂逅一个美丽动人的女子，并对她一见钟情。在另一方面，他正被一个富家女展开追求。而此时他倾心的那女子，也正周旋于一个已婚男子之中。当那年青人向她表白时，那女子要求与他在地铁站内玩捉迷藏来决定大家的缘份！

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Directed by the acclaimed filmmaker Wong Kar Wai, this epic action feature begins in Foshan when Ip Man, the martial arts master from the south, takes up a challenge by ageing northern master Gong Yu Tian. Ip Man wins the fight, but is then defeated by Gong Yu Tian's daughter Gong Er, with whom he forms an emotional bond...

programme.title: 一代宗师
programme.desc: 这部史诗式动作电影是由著名电影人王家卫执导。故事始于佛山，当时年迈的北方功夫宗师宫羽田公开挑战南方宗师叶问。叶问最终胜出，但后来输给宫羽田的女儿宫二，二人却因此结下情缘...

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: 混世四猴：神猴归来
programme.desc: 世人心目中的救世主灵明石猴，曾给一位绝望中的小女孩一个从没兑现的希望，让她一直深深牵挂。直至多年后，灵明石猴在与三眼战神激战后，被打破金身堕入凡尘，因而丧失神力。灵明石猴能否补偿当年小女孩的承诺？又可会破坏木神祸乱人间的阴谋？

programme.title: Let's Make Laugh II
programme.desc: Bodyguard Ah Sun is sent to protect his boss' son, only to meet and fall in love with his mistress, the gorgeous Joey. As love blossoms between the two, the powerful boss finds out and all hell breaks loose!

programme.title: 再见七日情
programme.desc: 护卫员阿逊被派往保护富商的儿子，期间巧遇住在隔壁的祖儿，更渐渐爱上她，却发现原来祖儿是富商的情妇。当他俩的恋情被富商发现后，事情一发不可收拾！

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: A wild and hilariously anachronistic tale of an imperial guard of the Forbidden City who has no martial arts abilities. When the emperor is abducted, he saved the day with his unusual hobby: tinkering with futuristic inventions!

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: A wild and hilariously anachronistic tale of an imperial guard of the Forbidden City who has no martial arts abilities. When the emperor is abducted, he saved the day with his unusual hobby: tinkering with futuristic inventions!

programme.title: 大内密探零零发
programme.desc: 零零发是宫廷四大高手之一，专职保卫皇帝的安全。虽然不谙武功，却有着不寻常的嗜好：打造超越时代的发明。皇上被掳后，他靠着自己的过人发明救驾。

programme.title: 大内密探零零发
programme.desc: 零零发是宫廷四大高手之一，专职保卫皇帝的安全。虽然不谙武功，却有着不寻常的嗜好：打造超越时代的发明。皇上被掳后，他靠着自己的过人发明救驾。

programme.title: Fight Back to School III
programme.desc: When millionaire Wong is found murdered in a hotel room, Sing, who bears a striking resemblance to the victim, goes undercover as the deceased to investigate the case. With Wong's marriage already on the rocks, his wife becomes the prime suspect. However, Sing soon uncovers that Wong's close friend is suspicious as well...

programme.title: 逃学威龙三之龙过鸡年
programme.desc: 富商王百万被发现离奇死于酒店房间，由于周星星与他极为相似，星星再次接受任务，作卧底调查这宗谋杀案。王百万生前与妻子感情早已破裂，妻子因此成为头号嫌疑人。然而，在调查过程中，星星发现王百万的友人林大岳同样形迹可疑......

programme.title: Let's Make Laugh
programme.desc: When a young housewife's debt-ridden, philandering husband leaves her with a mountain of tax debts, a security guard is hired by the tax authority to guard the assets, but he starts falling for her instead.

programme.title: 表错七日情
programme.desc: 一对年轻夫妇因欠税款被法庭下令封屋，限七日缴付欠税，并以房屋和财产作为抵偿。丈夫因移情别恋不知去向，法庭则雇用一个年轻的护卫员来看管少妇。那护卫员竟然与少妇日久生情...

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.title: 见怪
programme.desc: 失明的游己任在离岛的工厂工作。一天，因飓风的破坏，工厂与外界隔绝。此时突然有一只怪物来袭，任何看到怪物的人都会化成黑影。因游己任看不见怪物，他能成功协助伙伴安全离开，更奋战反击，誓要杀死怪物！

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao's enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei's concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: 关云长
programme.desc: 这是一场发生在三国动荡时期的史诗式之旅。曹操试图招揽关羽加入他的阵营，但关羽忠于他的结拜兄弟刘备，也是曹操的敌人。当关羽试图从曹操手上救出刘备的小妾时，迫于无奈要大开杀戒。最后他能否杀出重围？

programme.title: Perfect Girls
programme.desc: Chi will inherit his dying grandfather's fortune with one condition - he has to be married in a month, otherwise the money goes to his uncle, Robert. Chi falls in love with Siu Siu, but Robert intends to stop them by sending Moraine to seduce Chi. When Moraine decides to marry Chi for money, Robert stops her and reveals their plot.

programme.title: 靓足100分
programme.desc: 林天赐的富商祖父病重，欲将遗产留给他，但条件是天赐要在一个月内结婚，否则遗产将归祖父侄儿罗伯特。不久天赐邂逅乐小小，两人渐生情愫。罗伯特即派玛丽琳利用美人计破坏他俩的感情。不料玛丽琳贪图遗产，准备真的与林结婚。罗心有不甘，捣乱婚礼，并揭发她的计谋...

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend who is a ghost with a disfigured face. The journey of revenge and ultimate terror has just begun!

programme.title: 错爱迷踪
programme.desc: 跟朋友在酒吧喝酒的女孩邂逅恐怖小说家，两人一见钟情感情迅速升温。原来女孩已悄然落入惊天迷局，全因小说家的前女友是个毁容的女鬼，她借用人面还魂复仇，与前男友联手开启夺命惊吓。

programme.title: Doubles Cause Troubles
programme.desc: Two squabbling cousins find themselves in more trouble than they can imagine after their tenant ends up dead. The gangsters and the police are both after them, and they have no idea what they have done wrong!

programme.title: 神勇双妹唛
programme.desc: 故事描述一对表姐妹梁山伯与祝英台乃斗气冤家，两女为争夺神秘俊男阿山欢心，却惹来大圈杀手威吓逼害，更陷入一场宝物争夺战。两女身陷险境，惟有摒弃前嫌，联手反抗......

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: 除暴安良
programme.desc: 三名持枪劫匪抢劫了一批正在运送的新发行货币，刑警常勇奉命展开调查。随着线索逐渐浮现，常勇成功击毙一名劫匪。然而，其他两名劫匪不甘就此罢手，乘乱密谋抢劫金厂的黄金。常勇凭藉精密的部署，成功粉碎了他们的计划，将不法分子绳之以法。

programme.title: Winner Takes All
programme.desc: Two private detectives want to gain fame by solving a series of robberies. However, they were fooled by the King of Thieves during the investigation. It was later discovered that all the robberies were related to a Japanese businessman, Miyamoto. Who is the real King of Thieves?

programme.title: 贼王之王
programme.desc: 两名私家侦探欲藉破一连环大劫案而声名大噪。岂料调查过程中竟一再被贼王使计愚弄，笑话连篇。及后更发现原来所有劫案均与日商宫本有关，到底谁才是真正的贼王之王？

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian, in order to seek evidence against his gang. After their release from jail, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, just as Shan successfully cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: 黑白潜行
programme.desc: 香港警员阿山以卧底身份潜伏在监狱，接近罪犯天哥，以获取其犯罪集团的更多证据。二人获释后，阿山全力帮助天哥扶摇直上，最终使天哥成为集团的主脑。然而，当阿山协助警方顺利摧毁犯罪集团时，他却意外揭开了天哥的一个惊天秘密...

programme.title: Legend Of The Dragon
programme.desc: A young man Lung leaves his rural home on a small island to seek fortune in Hong Kong. His uncle cons Lung to play in a snooker tournament using his father's land as the bet. Lung lost the match but luckily, his childhood friend Momo encourages him to compete again using her land as the bet. Can he finally win his land back?

programme.title: 龙的传人
programme.desc: 青年周小龙离开纯朴的离岛到香港发展。他的师叔欺骗小龙参加桌球比赛，并以他父亲的地皮作为赌注。小龙最后输掉了比赛，幸得他青梅竹马的朋友毛毛鼓励，把自家的田地也作为赌注。小龙最后能否把自己的土地赢回来？

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: So was born a nobleman but is relegated to a beggar after being caught cheating. He becomes the chief of the Beggar's gang when he saves the gang's elder. One day, So foils an assassination attempt on the Emperor and is allowed to reinstate his status but he declines. He is then rewarded with an imperial beggar bowl and lives happily ever after.

programme.title: 武状元苏乞儿
programme.desc: 苏乞儿原为贵族，但因上京考武状元时作弊，被眨为乞儿。苏乞儿在机缘巧合下救了丐帮长老，并接任为新帮主。一天，皇上狩猎之时，差点被暗杀，幸苏乞儿及时救驾。皇帝欲恢复其官职时，苏乞儿却拒绝。其后，皇上御赐一个乞儿钵予苏乞儿，从此他过着愉快的行乞生活。

programme.title: Let's Have a Baby
programme.desc: De Sheng and Wan Jun have been married for years, but are unable to conceive. Wan Jun decides to undergo artificial insemination in the States and finally gets pregnant. She meets her cousin from the States who stays temporarily in their house with them, and De Sheng begins to suspect that they are having an affair...

programme.title: 替枪老豆
programme.desc: 万与夏婚后多年忽想生育，但万被证实不育，让夏接受人工受孕；但万心中仍感怪异，内心矛盾弄得精神紧张，行为乖张，闹出不少笑话；万在夏平安产子前后，屡有奇异幻想，误会连场，猜疑甚多，更怀疑夏与任职于夏威夷精子银行的表哥潘震伟有染，不是人工受孕，而是被人受孕。

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud's successor as the city's guard.

programme.title: 火云邪神之修罗面具
programme.desc: 十八年前，邪恶的黑羽会潜入了老邪神西城勇的地盘，盗走了修罗面具，而利用修罗面具放出当时只是个婴儿的魔神。老邪神为了魔神日后不作恶收养了婴儿，教他好好做人，成为小邪神。小邪神最后控制了面具的力量成为老邪神的接班人，继续守护城市。

programme.title: Love on Delivery
programme.desc: A delivery boy Yin wants to impress his dream girl Li, so he enrols in a martial arts course to learn strange moves. Being timid, Yin saves Li while wearing a Garfield mask but the credit is stolen by Karate Master, Liu. To prove himself and win Li back, Yin defeats Liu in the ring with his unique martial arts move "Invincible Wind and Fire Spin".

programme.title: 破坏之王
programme.desc: 外卖员何金银为让他的女神阿丽对他刮目相看，发奋习武，并学了奇怪的招式。胆小怕事的他一次头戴加菲猫面具拯救了阿丽，不料事后被空手道大师段水流领功。银为揭穿真相，最终在擂台使出绝招"无敌风火轮"击败段大师，并抱得美人归。

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: The World Today

The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: China 24

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei

It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Watch

programme.title: Ganteng Ganteng Bau Domba, Tapi Aku Suka
programme.desc: Yosi is devastated to discover that her high school crush is now her brother-in-law. Just as she feels her heart is permanently broken, she meets Ryan, a local sheep farmer. Ryan’s genuine love and simple life become the cure for Yosi's heartache, and she soon finds herself falling for the man who saved her spirit.

programme.title: Masuk Ke Hatiku Pelan Pelan Aja Neng Bajaj
programme.desc: Sherin, who was angry with her sister and her father, finally chose to leave home. There, Sharin worked as a mechanic at a bajaj repair shop. Sherin had fallen in love with a handsome bajaj driver, who had a younger sibling in elementary school who had once been hit by Sherin.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S1)

programme.title: Hit the Headlines
programme.desc: Headline Talk Show is a political show co-hosted by anchor Zhou Yuqin and director of the political center Lin Jiayuan. Today's major current events can be seen in "Headline Talk Show"! Taiwan shouldn't just have only one voice, nor should Taiwan have only one color. "Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.title: 头条开讲
programme.desc: 《头条开讲》是由主播周玉琴及政治中心主任林嘉源共同主持的政论性节目。今日大事看《头条开讲》就知道！台湾不能只有一种声音，也不能只有一种颜色。《头条开讲》最敢讲，你的心声我来讲！

programme.title: Super Followers
programme.desc: Join Jacky Wu and Sandy Wu as they bridge generation gaps and co-host this programme that integrates intellectual interviews to present a unique and high-quality variety talk show!

programme.title: 小明星大跟班
programme.desc: 综艺天王吴宗宪与他的前世情人吴姗儒，父女档跨越时代首次搭档主持，节目集结大型综艺特色，并融合知性访谈，将创造出独具特色且高品质的综艺访谈节目。

programme.title: CTI News Global Vision
programme.desc: US-China, India-Pacific and Cross-Strait. Global news is all in here. Invite high-profile figure experts to conduct the most authoritative reports.

programme.title: 全球大视野
programme.desc: 美中 印太 到两岸 全球新闻不漏接 邀请重量级专家 最权威报导

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. Expecting the viewing of the movie for nearly an hour is a rhythm and fresh, like a cloud and flowing water, which makes the viewers moved and harvests a rich intellectual journey.

programme.title: MIT台湾誌
programme.desc: MIT台湾誌, 记录台湾各地丰富多样的历史人文、风土产物、自然景观，以及特殊珍贵动、植物研究等自然生态、人物特写，高山风情等Made In Taiwan的主题内容。期使将近1小时的观影，是一种律动清新、如行云流水，令阅听人感动并收穫丰富的知性旅程

programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. The discussions ranging from controvercial topics to gossip and current events. Moreover, surprises from the guests of the show often go beyond all your expectation that you don't want to miss out!

programme.title: 康熙来了
programme.desc: 由搞笑天后徐熙娣及才子顽童蔡康永联手主持的谈话性综艺节目，通过访谈让人了解艺人不为人知的一面，在知性与理性的对话中，你想了解的，你想知道的幕后故事，通通让你一次看个够！
